content.text: REVIEW-PASS: 5.1.1(i) — Privacy policy claims (on-device camera OCR only, no location/analytics/sharing) match code: ReceiptCaptureView.swift uses AVFoundation/Vision for local OCR with comment "nothing leaves the device" (App/ReceiptCaptureView.swift:16-19), and no CoreLocation/analytics SDK imports found in the project.
